initial_location_description: The interior of a luxurious Taisho-era steam train car featuring deep red velvet seats, polished dark wood paneling, and warm brass gaslight fixtures that cast a flickering golden light through the cabin as it vibrates with the rhythm of the tracks.
initial_bgm: energetic woodwinds with a rhythmic, train-like percussion

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: WOOOO-HOOOO! Look at this! We're inside the belly of the beast! It's even bigger on the inside than it is on the outside!
main_dialogue.tone: Wildly aggressive and boisterous; his voice is filled with animalistic excitement and a lack of social grace.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing loudly and aggressively

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Quiet down, you loud-mouthed pig! People are staring! And stop calling it a beast, it's just a train! [whimpering] Oh no, why is it so cramped? We're trapped in here!
main_dialogue.tone: High-pitched and frantic; the quintessential 'nervous wreck' voice with a sharp, comedic edge.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on head, mouth wide open in a panicked scream

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Now, now, Zenitsu. Let's focus on finding Rengoku-san. He should be in this car... [sniffing] Wait, I smell something delicious. And... very intense.
main_dialogue.tone: Calm and grounding; his voice is warm and sincere, acting as the anchor for the group's chaos.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': booming, bright, and thunderously enthusiastic. Each word is a celebration of flavor.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eating, holding a bento box, eyes closed in delight, mouth open shouting Umai

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Uh... excuse me? Are you Kyojuro Rengoku-san, the Flame Hashira?
main_dialogue.tone: Polite and slightly hesitant; he is caught off guard by the sheer volume of the man.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Puzzled expression, tilting his head to the side

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: UMAI! [gulp] Yes! I am Kyojuro Rengoku! And you must be the boy with the box! Welcome to the Mugen Train!
main_dialogue.tone: Intensely friendly and direct; he speaks with a relentless, sun-like energy that leaves no room for doubt.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral, standing straight, arms at sides, wide enthusiastic smile

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The group gathers around the Flame Hashira, who sits surrounded by a small mountain of empty bento boxes. Despite his eccentric arrival, his presence radiates a searing, protective aura.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Sit! Relax! But stay alert. This train has become a graveyard. Over forty people have vanished from this vessel, along with several of our own swordsmen who were sent to investigate!
main_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and grave, yet maintaining an unwavering confidence that inspires courage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Confident, arms crossed over chest, chin up, bold grin

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask how the demon is hiding.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Forty people... and you can't find a trace? How can a demon hide its scent so well on a moving train?
branching_dialogue.tone: Inquisitive and analytical; his voice carries the weight of a seasoned hunter.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Thinking deeply, hand on chin, eyes closed

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
branching_dialogue.text: A fair question! Demons are cunning! But no matter where it hides, my blade will find its neck! We shall protect every passenger on this train!
branching_dialogue.tone: Fiery and resolute; his voice swells with pride and martial spirit.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: It's alright, Zenitsu. We have a Hashira with us. We'll get through this together.
branching_dialogue.tone: Soft and comforting; the gentle tone of a big brother.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gentle laughter, eyes closed, hand partially covering mouth

branching_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
branching_dialogue.text: A Hashira? You mean this guy who just yells about food?! We're doomed! We're all going to be eaten by the train monster!
branching_dialogue.tone: Explosive and shrill; a comedic peak of pure terror.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying heavily with snot bubbles, clutching his yellow haori

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The view through the train windows darkens as the sun disappears, replaced by the blurred, ghostly shapes of trees rushing past in the moonlight.
